ogTitle: Lake Frome vs Lake Gairdner: Climate Safety

heading: Lake Frome vs Lake Gairdner — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Frome, South Australia and Lake Gairdner, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Gairdner has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Lake Frome (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Frome or Lake Gairdner safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Frome has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Lake Gairdner scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Frome scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Gairdner scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Frome or Lake Gairdner?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Gairdner has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
